task_completion.description: Open EdrawMax and create a House of Quality (QFD) diagram
task_completion.visual_evidence: EdrawMax application window is open, showing a canvas with a House of Quality (QFD) matrix structure (a grid with a triangular roof).

task_completion.description: Add the title 'Pro Laptop QFD Matrix'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Pro Laptop QFD Matrix' is visible on the canvas, typically at the top of the diagram.

task_completion.description: Add Customer Requirements to the rows
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Instant Wake-up', 'All-Day Battery', and 'Sunlight Readability' is visible in the row headers (usually on the left side) of the QFD matrix.

task_completion.description: Add Technical Descriptors to the columns
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'NVMe SSD Storage', '99Wh Battery Pack', and '1000-nit Mini-LED' is visible in the column headers (usually below the roof) of the QFD matrix.

task_completion.description: Add Strong and Weak relationships in the matrix intersections
task_completion.visual_evidence: Symbols (like circles, double circles, triangles) or text indicating relationships are visible in the specific intersection cells of the matrix (e.g., between 'Instant Wake-up' and 'NVMe SSD Storage', and 'All-Day Battery' and '1000-nit Mini-LED').

task_completion.description: Add Negative Correlation in the roof
task_completion.visual_evidence: A symbol (like an X or minus sign) or text indicating a Negative Correlation is visible in the triangular roof section, specifically at the intersection of '99Wh Battery Pack' and '1000-nit Mini-LED'.
A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog box is visible showing the file names 'laptop_qfd.eddx' or 'laptop_qfd.pdf' in the Documents folder, or a file manager window shows these files.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the EdrawMax graphical interface to build the diagram. There should be no evidence of using terminal commands or Python scripts to generate the .eddx or .pdf files directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual EdrawMax application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must show the EdrawMax application with its distinctive ribbon, toolbars, and QFD symbols, not a generic text editor or a different drawing application.

integrity.description: The agent constructed the diagram rather than pasting an image
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must be seen constructing the diagram by adding text and symbols to the template, rather than just pasting a complete image of a QFD diagram into the canvas.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are /home/ga/Documents/laptop_qfd.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/laptop_qfd.pdf. The diagram must contain the strings 'Pro Laptop', 'Instant Wake-up', 'All-Day Battery', 'NVMe SSD', and 'Mini-LED'.
